problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of mRNA. mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
